scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "cd apps/server && ../../node_modules/.bin/tsx watch src/index.ts" "cd apps/web && ./node_modules/.bin/vite"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.vercel-build: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter web build
